title: Rajiv Satyal: All Over the Place
original_title: Rajiv Satyal: All Over the Place
overview: Rajiv Satyal has shared stages with some of the biggest names in standup comedy, performed on all seven continents and headlined live shows worldwide for decades. All Over the Place recounts tales from the road and lessons learned in life.
